mandate: Three UX changes for the shared-number beta model: onboarding phone copy, GuestsView phone masking by plan tier, and Concierge pricing feature addition
keyFindings: GuestsView had no props and needed plan passed from DashboardClient via Couple type
The couples table already has a plan column used by the pricing page but not fetched by the dashboard
whatWorked: Adding plan to the existing Couple interface and threading it through the page, DashboardClient, and into GuestsView as a simple prop
whatFailed: Nothing failed; clean compilation on first tsc pass after fixing return type annotations
recommendationsForNextAgent: The masking logic defaults to masked when plan is null, which is the safest beta behavior. If plan tiers change, update the maskPhone function in GuestsView.tsx.
spiritContribution: Protected guest privacy by defaulting to masked phones, created clear upgrade path for Concierge tier
